title: Preset Manager UI
summary: Adds a Preset Manager section to the Style tab for saving, applying and deleting appearance presets.

changes.description: Added <div id="stylePresetsSection"> placeholder in the Style tab HTML, rendered before the draft bar.
loadPresetsSection(uid) is now called at the end of loadStyleTab so the preset section is populated every time the Style tab opens.
Added async loadPresetsSection(uid): renders preset cards (name + Apply + Delete), a Save-current row with name input, and enforces MAX_APPEARANCE_PRESETS limit.
Apply button calls applyAppearancePreset then reloads loadStyleTab for instant preview.
Delete button calls deleteAppearancePreset then refreshes the section in-place.
Save button reads name input, calls createAppearancePreset + saveAppearancePreset, then refreshes section and shows a toast.
